source: npm registry API + npmjs.com package pages

packages.name: @anthropic-ai/sdk
packages.description: The official TypeScript library for the Anthropic API
packages.notes: Primary SDK for direct Claude API access via api.anthropic.com. Supports Node.js 18+, Deno, Bun, Cloudflare Workers, Vercel Edge. In this repo: use CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN — ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is forbidden by the repo invariant.

packages.name: @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk
packages.description: SDK for building AI agents with Claude Code's capabilities. Programmatically interact with Claude to build autonomous agents that can understand codebases, edit files, and execute workflows.
packages.notes: Has reached 1M+ weekly npm downloads. Provides platform-specific native binaries as optional dependencies. dist-tags: latest=0.3.162, next=0.3.162. Versioned in lockstep with @anthropic-ai/claude-code.

packages.name: @anthropic-ai/bedrock-sdk
packages.description: The official TypeScript library for the Anthropic Bedrock API
packages.notes: Claude SDK for AWS Bedrock. Uses AWS credential chain (~/.aws/credentials, AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID/AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY env vars). Supports Node.js 18+, Deno, Bun, Cloudflare Workers, Vercel Edge. Docs: platform.claude.com/docs/en/build-with-claude/claude-on-amazon-bedrock.

packages.name: @anthropic-ai/vertex-sdk
packages.description: The official TypeScript library for the Anthropic Vertex API
packages.notes: Claude SDK for Google Cloud Vertex AI. Uses google-auth-library credential chain (GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS, CLOUD_ML_REGION, ANTHROPIC_VERTEX_PROJECT_ID). Extends the main SDK.

packages.name: @anthropic-ai/foundry-sdk
packages.description: The official TypeScript library for the Anthropic Foundry API — Claude SDK for Microsoft Azure AI Foundry
packages.notes: Provides access to Claude via Microsoft Azure AI Foundry. Supports API key auth (ANTHROPIC_FOUNDRY_API_KEY) and Azure AD token provider (getBearerTokenProvider). Published ~4 months ago (early 2026). Docs: platform.claude.com/docs/en/build-with-claude/claude-in-microsoft-foundry.

packages.name: @anthropic-ai/claude-code
packages.description: Use Claude, Anthropic's AI assistant, right from your terminal. Claude can understand your codebase, edit files, run terminal commands, and handle entire workflows for you.
packages.notes: CLI tool. Ships native platform binaries as optional dependencies since v2.1.113 (switched from bundled cli.js). Auth: CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN only — ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is forbidden by this repo's invariant. FreeBSD binaries not yet published (GitHub issue anthropics/claude-code#61313).

packages.name: @anthropic-ai/dxt
packages.notes: DEPRECATED — renamed to @anthropic-ai/mcpb. All versions 0.1.0–0.2.6 carry the npm deprecation notice. Originally introduced June 26, 2025 as the CLI for .dxt Desktop Extension files. File extension renamed from .dxt to .mcpb on Sep 11, 2025. Existing .dxt files still work.

packages.name: @anthropic-ai/mcpb
packages.notes: CLI and library for creating .mcpb (MCP Bundle) files — zip archives containing a local MCP server + manifest.json. Successor to @anthropic-ai/dxt. Also mirrored at modelcontextprotocol/mcpb (1.9k stars). Open-source spec designed for adoption by any AI desktop app. Supports Node.js, Python (traditional + UV runtime v0.4+), and binary bundles.

packages.name: @anthropic-ai/tokenizer
packages.notes: Client-side token counting for cost estimation and context window management. Beta status — last published 3 years ago (stable but not actively updated for newer Claude models). Supports Node.js 12+ and Deno.

packages.name: @anthropic-ai/sandbox-runtime
packages.description: Anthropic Sandbox Runtime (ASRT) - A general-purpose tool for wrapping security boundaries around arbitrary processes
packages.notes: Powers the secure execution environment for Claude Code. Uses macOS seatbelt (sandbox-exec) on Mac and Linux bubblewrap for process isolation, plus network filtering and filesystem restrictions. Under anthropic-experimental GitHub org.

packages.name: @anthropic-ai/claude-trace
packages.description: OTEL trace viewer for Claude Code sessions
packages.notes: OpenTelemetry trace viewer — starts a local server to visualize traces from claude-code subprocess runs. Published ~4 months ago (early 2026). Integrate with CF AI Gateway or Sentry for production observability.

packages.name: @anthropic-ai/universal-sdk
packages.notes: Placeholder — reserved name, not stable for use. Version 0.0.0 only.

platform_binary_packages.description: Prebuilt native binaries shipped as optional dependencies of the parent package. npm's optionalDependencies resolution installs the correct platform binary automatically. Do not install these directly.
platform_binary_packages.notes: FreeBSD binaries not yet published (GitHub issue anthropics/claude-code#61313, filed 2026-05-21). WSL2 target: linux-x64; Alpine Docker images: linux-x64-musl.

napi_native_addons.description: N-API native addon packages bundled inside @anthropic-ai/claude-code binary. Not independently importable from npm.

packages.name: color-diff-napi
packages.purpose: Pixel diff for screenshot comparison (vision testing)

napi_native_addons.note: Not independently installable — bundled only inside the @anthropic-ai/claude-code native binary. audio-capture-napi has a reserved placeholder on npm (pacifier136/audio-capture-napi@0.0.1).

mcp_framework_packages.name: @modelcontextprotocol/hono
mcp_framework_packages.purpose: Hono framework MCP transport — deploy as CF Worker
